scripts.lint: npx eslint src/ --ext .js,.jsx --max-warnings 0 --no-eslintrc --rule 'no-unused-vars: warn' --rule 'no-undef: error' --env browser,es2022
scripts.check: npm run build && node -e "const n=require('fs').readdirSync('api').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).length; console.log('API functions:',n); if(n>12){console.error('ERROR: exceeds 12');process.exit(1)}"
